title: Segfault during query involving LEFT JOIN column in the ORDER BY clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER, c TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t2(b, c) VALUES(1, NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON a = b ORDER BY c IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Segfault during LEFT JOIN with ORDER BY clause
